props.ChoiceText: Sacred work demanded more from your hands than skill alone, and the result changed how others judged you.
props.ChoiceBio: An ecclesiastical commission made your work visible in sacred spaces and changed how others saw you.

0.TransitionText: Because an ecclesiastical commission made your work visible in sacred spaces and changed how others saw you, your life stayed with tools, labor, and the discipline of making things well.

1.TransitionText: Because an ecclesiastical commission made your work visible in sacred spaces and changed how others saw you, sacred commissions and devotion bent your labor toward religious life.
